en-US.name: Secret Billionaire
en-US.summary: Build your empire one move at a time with a sharp strategic move, mindset shift, idea, or question.
en-US.description: Secret Billionaire is a premium noir-style Alexa ritual for ambitious people building wealth from real-world starting points. Each time a customer opens the skill or asks for a category, the skill delivers one short, sharp coaching moment focused on leverage, systems, ownership, recurring revenue, opportunity recognition, and high-agency decision making. The experience stays concise, practical, and voice friendly, then offers one simple yes-or-no follow-up so the customer can keep going without memorizing commands.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask secret billionaire for today's move
Alexa, ask secret billionaire for a mindset shift
Alexa, ask secret billionaire for a business idea
Alexa, ask secret billionaire for a ten x question

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Test launch, today's move, mindset shift, business idea, ten X question, opportunity spotter, help, yes, no, stop, cancel, and fallback. After each primary insight, the skill recommends one next category and the customer can simply say yes or no. The skill is stateless and does not require account linking or customer-contact permissions. It uses OpenRouter with the Kimi 2.5 model to generate short branded business insights without sending customer contact information. If the API is unavailable, the skill falls back to an internal content library. Echo Show devices should render the branded APL response with the spoken insight, follow-up footer, and muted background video.
